title: synostemon huntii
intro: Synostemon huntii, also known as the native Australian plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in Australian herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various ailments including colds and respiratory issues. The leaves of the Synostemon huntii plant have been found to have antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating congestion. Synostemon huntii can be prepared as an herbal infusion, a tea made by steeping the leaves in hot water, or as a topical application to be used for external skin issues.
